agent_output: {"domain_analysis":{"business_context":"E-commerce platform managing the product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, inventory reservation, promotions, discounts, order lifecycle, and refund processes. The rules govern the full purchase flow from cart to post-delivery refund window.","bounded_context":"Order & Checkout bounded context, with touchpoints into Inventory, Promotions, and Payments contexts.","ubiquitous_language":[{"term":"Cart","definition":"A transient collection of items a customer intends to purchase. No inventory commitment is made at the cart stage."},{"term":"Checkout","definition":"The process initiated when a customer commits to purchasing cart contents. Triggers inventory reservation."},{"term":"Inventory Reservation","definition":"A time-bound hold on inventory units for a specific checkout session. Expires after 15 minutes without payment."},{"term":"Reservation Release","definition":"The act of returning reserved inventory units to available stock when a checkout is abandoned or times out."},{"term":"Promotion","definition":"A seller-defined pricing adjustment applied to a specific product (e.g., percentage off, sale price). A product may have at most one active promotion."},{"term":"Discount Code","definition":"A buyer-supplied code that applies a discount at the order level. Mutually exclusive with promotional pricing."},{"term":"Order","definition":"An immutable record of a completed purchase created upon payment confirmation."},{"term":"Payment Confirmation","definition":"The event marking successful funds capture, after which the order becomes immutable."},{"term":"Refund Window","definition":"The 30-day period after delivery during which a customer may request a refund."},{"term":"Active Promotion","definition":"A promotion currently in effect for a product. Only one may exist per product at any time."},{"term":"Zero Inventory","definition":"A product state where available units (unreserved) are zero, making it unpurchasable regardless of catalog visibility."}]},"business_rules":[{"id":"BR-1","rule":"Inventory is not reserved when items are added to the cart; reservation occurs only when checkout begins.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"If inventory were reserved at cart-add, phantom holds would corrupt stock counts and block legitimate purchases. The system's inventory integrity depends on this boundary.","testable_assertion":"Adding an item to a cart does not decrement available inventory or create any reservation record."},{"id":"BR-2","rule":"An inventory reservation expires and is released if payment is not completed within 15 minutes of checkout initiation.","invariant":false,"invariant_justification":"The 15-minute window is a business policy threshold. A VP could change it to 10 or 20 minutes without corrupting system state.","testable_assertion":"A reservation created at time T with no payment confirmation by T+15m is released, and the reserved units return to available inventory."},{"id":"BR-3","rule":"A product can have a maximum of one active promotion at a time.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Multiple simultaneous promotions on a single product would create pricing ambiguity and potential revenue loss. The constraint preserves pricing integrity.","testable_assertion":"Attempting to activate a second promotion on a product that already has an active promotion is rejected by the system."},{"id":"BR-4","rule":"Discount codes cannot be combined with promotional pricing — only one discount mechanism applies per order.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Stacking discounts could result in below-cost pricing and revenue corruption. The mutual exclusivity preserves pricing integrity at the order level.","testable_assertion":"When a product in the order has an active promotion, applying a discount code is rejected (or vice versa). The order total reflects exactly one discount mechanism."},{"id":"BR-5","rule":"Orders cannot be modified after payment is confirmed.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Post-payment immutability is a financial integrity constraint. Modifications after funds capture would desync the order record from the actual financial transaction.","testable_assertion":"Any attempt to add, remove, or change line items on an order with status 'paid' or beyond is rejected."},{"id":"BR-6","rule":"A product with zero available inventory cannot be purchased, even if it remains listed in the catalog.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Allowing purchase of zero-inventory items would create unfulfillable orders, violating physical fulfillment constraints.","testable_assertion":"Initiating checkout for a product with zero available inventory fails with an appropriate error, regardless of catalog listing status."},{"id":"BR-7","rule":"Refunds must be requested within 30 days of the delivery date.","invariant":false,"invariant_justification":"The 30-day window is a customer service policy. Management could extend or shorten it without corrupting system state.","testable_assertion":"A refund request submitted on delivery_date + 31 days is rejected. A request on delivery_date + 30 days is accepted."}],"acceptance_criteria":[{"id":"AC-1","given":"A customer has items in their cart","when":"The customer adds another item to the cart","then":"Available inventory for that item remains unchanged and no reservation record is created"},{"id":"AC-2","given":"A customer initiates checkout with items in their cart","when":"Checkout begins","then":"Inventory reservations are created for each item and available inventory is decremented by the reserved quantities"},{"id":"AC-3","given":"A checkout session has been initiated with active reservations","when":"15 minutes elapse without payment confirmation","then":"All reservations for that session are released and available inventory is restored by the reserved quantities"},{"id":"AC-4","given":"A checkout session is active and payment is submitted","when":"Payment is confirmed before the 15-minute timeout","then":"Reservations are converted to a confirmed order and inventory is permanently decremented"},{"id":"AC-5","given":"A product already has an active promotion","when":"An administrator attempts to activate a second promotion on the same product","then":"The system rejects the second promotion and the original promotion remains active"},{"id":"AC-6","given":"A customer's cart contains a product with an active promotion","when":"The customer applies a discount code at checkout","then":"The system rejects the discount code and informs the customer that discount codes cannot be combined with promotional pricing"},{"id":"AC-7","given":"A customer applies a valid discount code to their order","when":"A product in the order subsequently has a promotion activated","then":"The promotional price does not apply to this order; the discount code takes precedence for the in-flight checkout"},{"id":"AC-8","given":"An order has been paid and confirmed","when":"Any attempt is made to modify the order (add, remove, or change items)","then":"The modification is rejected and the order remains unchanged"},{"id":"AC-9","given":"A product is listed in the catalog with zero available inventory","when":"A customer attempts to initiate checkout for that product","then":"Checkout is blocked with a clear out-of-stock error message"},{"id":"AC-10","given":"A product has zero inventory but items were reserved before stock reached zero","when":"The customer with the existing reservation completes payment within 15 minutes","then":"The order is confirmed because their units were already reserved"},{"id":"AC-11","given":"An order was delivered 29 days ago","when":"The customer requests a refund","then":"The refund request is accepted and processed"},{"id":"AC-12","given":"An order was delivered 31 days ago","when":"The customer requests a refund","then":"The refund request is rejected as outside the refund window"},{"id":"AC-13","given":"An order was delivered exactly 30 days ago","when":"The customer requests a refund","then":"The refund request is accepted (30 days inclusive)"}],"edge_cases":[{"scenario":"Two customers attempt checkout for the last remaining unit simultaneously","expected_behavior":"Only the first checkout to secure the reservation succeeds. The second receives an out-of-stock error. Reservation must be atomic to prevent overselling."},{"scenario":"Customer's checkout reservation expires at the exact moment payment confirmation arrives","expected_behavior":"System must handle this race condition with a clear precedence rule. Recommended: if payment confirmation is processed before the release transaction commits, honor the payment. Otherwise, reject payment and inform the customer."},{"scenario":"A promotion is deactivated while a customer is mid-checkout with that promotional price","expected_behavior":"The price locked at checkout initiation should be honored for the duration of the reservation window. Promotional deactivation should not retroactively change in-flight checkout pricing."},{"scenario":"Customer applies a discount code, then the product gets a promotion before payment","expected_behavior":"The discount code applied at checkout takes precedence. The promotional price does not override the already-applied discount mechanism for this order."},{"scenario":"Product inventory reaches zero due to reservations, but those reservations later expire","expected_behavior":"Upon reservation release, inventory becomes available again. Customers should be able to purchase the product once inventory is restored."},{"scenario":"Customer requests a refund for a partially delivered order","expected_behavior":"The 30-day refund window should apply per delivery, not per order. Items delivered on different dates have independent refund windows."},{"scenario":"Multiple discount codes submitted in rapid succession","expected_behavior":"Only one discount code can be applied. The system should prevent race conditions that could stack codes."},{"scenario":"A product's inventory drops to zero between cart-add and checkout initiation","expected_behavior":"Checkout initiation fails for the out-of-stock item. Cart contents do not guarantee availability."}],"business_impact":{"financial":"Correct inventory reservation prevents overselling (costly fulfillment failures and customer compensation). Single-discount-mechanism rule protects margins from discount stacking abuse. Post-payment immutability maintains financial audit integrity.","operational":"15-minute reservation timeout balances conversion rate against inventory lock-up. Zero-inventory purchase prevention avoids unfulfillable orders entering the fulfillment pipeline. Single-promotion-per-product simplifies pricing engine logic and reduces pricing errors.","user":"Cart-without-reservation provides a frictionless browsing experience. Clear rules on discount exclusivity set transparent expectations. 30-day refund window provides reasonable post-purchase protection.","risk":"Race conditions at reservation boundaries (timeout edge, concurrent checkout for last unit) are the primary technical risk. Discount stacking bypass would be a financial exploit vector. Failure to enforce post-payment immutability could create accounting discrepancies.","stakeholders_affected":[{"group":"Customers","impact":"Clear purchasing rules, transparent discount behavior, 30-day refund safety net. Potential frustration if inventory disappears between cart and checkout."},{"group":"Merchandising Team","impact":"Single-promotion constraint simplifies campaign management but limits stacking strategies. Must plan promotions serially per product."},{"group":"Finance / Accounting","impact":"Post-payment immutability and single-discount rules ensure clean transaction records and predictable revenue."},{"group":"Warehouse / Fulfillment","impact":"Reservation system prevents unfulfillable orders from entering the pipeline. 15-minute timeout prevents prolonged inventory lock-up."},{"group":"Customer Support","impact":"Clear refund window policy (30 days from delivery) provides unambiguous rules for handling refund requests. Boundary cases (day 30 vs day 31) need precise tooling."},{"group":"Engineering / Platform","impact":"Must implement atomic reservation, race condition handling at timeout boundaries, and mutual exclusion logic for discounts. Concurrency correctness is critical."}]},"confidence":{"level":82,"reasoning":"The specification is well-articulated with clear, non-contradictory rules. All seven rules are explicitly stated with unambiguous intent. Confidence is not higher because the spec does not address several real-world details (partial delivery refunds, multi-currency, tax implications of promotions, discount precedence when both are attempted simultaneously). These are not blocking gaps but represent areas where implementation teams may need further clarification.","high_confidence_areas":["Inventory reservation lifecycle (cart → checkout → timeout/payment)","Single promotion per product constraint","Discount mutual exclusivity rule","Post-payment order immutability","Zero-inventory purchase prevention","Refund window boundary (30 days from delivery)"],"low_confidence_areas":["Which discount mechanism takes precedence when a promotional product and discount code conflict — spec says only one applies but does not specify which wins","Whether the 30-day refund window is calendar days or business days","Refund policy for partially delivered orders with different delivery dates","Whether promotional pricing locked at checkout survives promotion deactivation mid-session","Handling of the exact 15-minute boundary race condition between payment and expiration"],"assumptions":["The 15-minute reservation timeout is measured from checkout initiation, not from last user activity","The 30-day refund window uses calendar days inclusive of the delivery date","Inventory count refers to available (unreserved) units, not total physical stock","Discount codes apply at the order level, not per line item","Refund eligibility is calculated based on delivery date, implying delivery tracking exists"]},"escalations":[],"rejection_reasons":[]}

The rules govern the full purchase flow from cart to post-delivery refund window.","bounded_context":"Order & Checkout bounded context, with touchpoints into Inventory, Promotions, and Payments contexts.","ubiquitous_language":[{"term":"Cart","definition":"A transient collection of items a customer

content.thinking:
Let me analyze this e-commerce domain scenario carefully.

The rules are clear and well-defined. Let me classify each business rule and determine invariants vs policies.

No contradictions, no ambiguity, no missing context that would block analysis. The spec is reasonably complete for what's described.

Let me produce the analysis.
